mission: We bridge the gap between classroom theory and real-world application by empowering the next generation of engineers and scientists in competing at the highest level of international robotics, cultivating the skills necessary to tackle the most demanding engineering problems of tomorrow.
vision: To serve as a premier Singaporean student led team for hands-on design and engineering excellence, fostering a culture of interdisciplinary teamwork and leadership.

outreachGoals.title: University Outreach
outreachGoals.description: Engaging NUS students across all faculties to join, collaborate, and grow through hands-on engineering challenges that go beyond the classroom.

outreachGoals.title: STEM Education
outreachGoals.description: Running workshops, demos, and talks at schools and community events to inspire young Singaporeans to pursue science, technology, engineering, and mathematics.

outreachGoals.title: Industry Partnerships
outreachGoals.description: Collaborating with industry sponsors and research institutions to bridge academia and real-world engineering, creating opportunities for students and advancing rover technology.
